sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, timestamp_col TIMESTAMPTZ, value FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (group_id INT, group_value FLOAT);
SELECT group_id, kurtosis_pop(value) AS kurtosis FROM test_table GROUP BY group_id HAVING kurtosis_pop(value) > 1;
SELECT t.id, (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-04 12:00:00 +00:00' - t.timestamp_col) AS time_difference, kurtosis_pop(t.value) AS kurtosis FROM test_table t WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT t1.id, (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-04 12:00:00 +00:00' - t1.timestamp_col) AS time_diff, t2.group_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN secondary_table t2 ON kurtosis_pop(t2.group_value) = t1.value WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-04 12:00:00 +00:00' - timestamp_col) AS time_diff FROM test_table WHERE value > 15.0 ORDER BY time_diff;
SELECT (SELECT kurtosis_pop(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS overall_kurtosis, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM secondary_table) AS group_count;
SELECT id, value, kurtosis_pop(value) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY timestamp_col) AS kurtosis_window FROM test_table;
SELECT GROUP_ID, kurtosis_pop(group_value) AS kurtosis_value FROM secondary_table GROUP BY group_id HAVING kurtosis_pop(group_value) < 5;
